title: elaphoglossum lividum
intro: Elaphoglossum lividum is a species of epiphytic fern, belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Elaphoglossum lividum have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce swelling, fight against infections, and even help in treating certain types of cancer. Elaphoglossum lividum is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
